response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished polyglot developer with strong communication and infrastructure expertise, he is fundamentally misaligned with this role. The position requires 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows—Bogdan shows only ~6 months of C++ work at National Instruments. Additionally, the role mandates financial domain expertise (fixed income/derivatives or capital markets); Bogdan's experience is entirely in web, GIS, and data platforms with zero financial services background. The absence of these mandatory qualifications is disqualifying despite his otherwise strong technical track record.
strengths: Excellent communication and teaching ability, demonstrated through multiple technical workshops and conference talks
Strong DevOps and infrastructure expertise with CI/CD, Docker, and deployment systems knowledge
Polyglot programmer with Java experience and proven ability to master diverse technology stacks
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience vs. required 5–10 years—critical deficiency on a mandatory requirement
No evidence of Windows platform development; resume focuses on Linux, web backends, and full-stack environments
Complete absence of capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domain knowledge—fails mandatory domain expertise requirement
